chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 8073 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge Direction. For Order as to non-prosecution. ----------------- 11.01.2023. Mr. Aqeel Ahmed Khan, Advocate for Petitioners. --------------- Counsel, under instructions, submits that this Petition has become infructuous. Accordingly, the same is dismissed having become infructuous with pending application(s). Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
